TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Milo ńźukanovińá Milo ńźukanovińá (ryax sa 15 na byacing tay 2 squ kawas na 1962 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1962) mrhuw Montenegro ta' kawas 2018 - kawas 2023 hya' ga Milo ńźukanovińá, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Milo ńźukanovińá minkahul sa NikŇ°ińá na Montenegro. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1962 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' ŤíôÁČĻŚÖßŚď•ÁĺÖÁłĹÁĶĪ canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: milo *ukano*i* milo *ukano*i* (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw montene…£ro ta Ē kawas~…ē **** - kawas~…ē **** ńßja Ē …£a milo *ukano*i*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral milo *ukano*i* minkańßul s~…ēa nik*i* na montene…£ro. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ******* ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
